tasks.label: Arduino: Upload J-Link
args: nrfjprog --jdll /Applications/SEGGER/JLink_V794e/libjlinkarm.dylib -f nrf52 --recover && nrfjprog --jdll /Applications/SEGGER/JLink_V794e/libjlinkarm.dylib -f nrf52 --program ${workspaceFolder}/build/RAK4630LEDTEST.ino_full.hex --chiperase --verify && nrfjprog --jdll /Applications/SEGGER/JLink_V794e/libjlinkarm.dylib -f nrf52 --reset
